title: antidesma coriaceum
intro: Antidesma coriaceum, also known as the rough lemon or coriaceous Antidesma, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antidesma coriaceum include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Antidesma coriaceum can be made into a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
